text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Students are showing off their skills to the trainers at the academy's
big tryout race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though everyone is putting their heart into it, one racer has no
problem outshining them.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Now I'll really let loose!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaah! Wooo!!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
M-Maruzensky's picking up even more speed! She's leaving the pack
behind! No one can catch up now!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Hehe, the wind on my face feels great!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: L-look at her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's strong, beautiful, and faster than the wind...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Looks like I still got more in the tank!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But what makes her special is that she's having more fun than anyone
else on the track.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Maruzensky takes first! She blew the competition away—a
fantastic run!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaah! Wooo!!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Aaah, I feel great after that. ♪ I almost wish it wasn't over so
quick.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Maruzenkyyy! Wow! Just, wow! You were great!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I-I've never seen such a fast time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, hi, everyone! Aren't you sweet for cheering me on!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I cried, it was so amazing! I wanna be as fast as you someday! Can we
go partner running again soon?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, that's no sweat. We could do it right after this! I'm always
amped for another run. ♪

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, a victory with a huge lead, and still ready for more? You're
something else, Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You've got an engine like no other. So, please... join my team,
Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Alrighty—wait, what?

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky, you'll be our ace! Maruzensky! Let's talk, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh goodness...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her fantastic tryout race, she's surrounded by trainers all wanting
her on their team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems she's got other ideas though...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Maruzensky—a racer like you could be an undefeated
Triple Crown Champion! Let's make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That certainly sounds exciting, but... I have to say no. I appreciate
your enthusiasm though.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You're going to become a racing legend! Let me help you write your
name down in history!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, isn't that a bit of an exaggeration? I don't think I've got that much potential. Sorry. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky is approached by trainer after trainer but politely refuses
them all.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hey... She's been turning down trainers left and right—even since
before the tryouts. Why is that?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I bet she's got her sights set higher than all of them combined!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you're right, of course! I hope I get to see her work with a trainer
who deserves her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, she didn't sign on with any of the trainers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, on a quiet evening a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to be walking past the training course when I see
Maruzensky, her hair flowing back as she runs.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Still time. Okay, think I'll do one more lap. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff... Haha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The excitement I felt at the tryouts flutters through my heart again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She really—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Faster... Faster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: —looks so happy on the track, like she's having a blast!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Phew. Doesn't get any better. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh? Hey, you're the trainer from the other day at the tryouts... Right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh? Hey, you're the trainer from the other day at the tryouts... Right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, did you come all this way to try and scout me? Hehe, that's
some nice commitment.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, what kind of approach will you use? Something like how you saw
future glory in my running?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, what kind of approach will you use? Something like how you saw
future glory in my running?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Just?
choice_data_list:
I just thought you enjoy running like no-one
else does.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh? Just that?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, I never... That's really all? Wow...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha! You're unusual—I'll give you that.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Haha! You're unusual—I'll give you that.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm going to keep on running, so... you keep on watching if
you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm going to keep on running, so... you keep on watching if
you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I keep on watching. It's insane how fast she runs, but she
always looks happy while she does it.
